landing.title: JAPAM
landing.description: Match divine candies. Hear mantras. Build your japa.

mahaYagnas.title: Maha Japa Yagnas
mahaYagnas.description: Japas from Pro members who joined a Maha Japa Yagna count toward that yagna's shared goal.
mahaYagnas.proOnlyMessage: Pro members can join yagnas and submit their japas. Unlock Pro to join and contribute.
mahaYagnas.yourYagnasDesc: Do your japa for these yagnas — your japas count toward the collective goal.
mahaYagnas.downloadNotice: Downloaded. To post on WhatsApp Status: open WhatsApp → Status → My Status → add the downloaded image.

japaDashboard.title: Japa Dashboard
japaDashboard.handwritingInstructions: Write your nama phrase on paper, take a photo. Go to remove.bg to remove the background, then upload the image here. It will appear in the PDF at the same size as the default text. We don't save your image—you may save it on your device for future downloads.
japaDashboard.name: Name
japaDashboard.uploadImageError: Please upload an image file (PNG, JPG, etc.)

shared.try_japam_a_beautiful_app_to_chant_your_: Try Japam – a beautiful app to chant your favourite God's name and track your japas! Play here: https://www.japam.digital Join the community, complete marathons, and grow your spiritual practice daily. 🕉️
shared.welcome_to_japam_we_our_or_us_a_digital_: Welcome to Japam (""we"", ""our"", or ""us""), a digital mantra practice platform...
shared.were_sorry_the_app_encountered_an_error_: We're sorry. The app encountered an error. Please refresh the page or try again later.
shared.write_your_nama_phrase_on_paper_take_a_p: Write your nama phrase on paper, take a photo. Go to remove.bg to remove the background, then upload the image here. It will appear in the PDF at the same size as the default text. We don't save your image—you may save it on your device for future downloads.
